sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73851" key="o(mo/tafos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμό-τᾰφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73851.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">buried together,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg001.perseus-grc1:149" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.149</biblScope> </bibl> ; <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινος</itype> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.359b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
